name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Christmas is About Christ
body:
| Dear Peter,

You've heard it and felt the sting of it; the "War on Christmas." The fact is, it's not a war on Christmas, it's a "War on Christ"! A war to remove Him from the public square; out of the American culture! But with your support and help, My Faith Votes has stood in the gap during the battle. Our efforts this year, culminating with one of the strongest turnouts of Christians in modern history, is proof a new path is being set for America. This path is only the beginning, and like every beginning, it starts with a birth. We have won some battles, but the war rages.

We pray that you will stay strong in your faith during this Christmas season and into the New Year. My Faith Votes wants to thank you for your support and prayers, and we want to wish you a Merry Christmas and a blessed New Year in the strength of Jesus.

In Christ,

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/39503095:sEQ1DguN1:m:1:876315805:3D27AE12BF150CEDFA20E6478E9D6D2F:r)
Jason Yates, CEO
My Faith Votes

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/39503095:sEQ1DguN1:m:1:876315805:3D27AE12BF150CEDFA20E6478E9D6D2F:r)
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

subject: Sign our holiday card for the First Family ☞
body:

---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c299/4067b0a/22c79d96a/7e060f58/3353185068/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161223_dnc_rem&source=em_20161223_dnc_rem"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c299/4067b0a/22c79d96a/7e060f59/3353185068/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161223_dnc_rem&source=em_20161223_dnc_rem"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c299/4067b0a/22c79d96a/7e060f66/3353185068/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161223_dnc_rem&source=em_20161223_dnc_rem") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c299/4067b0a/22c79d96a/7e060f67/3353185068/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161223_dnc_rem&source=em_20161223_dnc_rem"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: 2017 Governor's Inauguration Committee
subject: 2017 Governor Carney Inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8687547980183502848/-5920799746829582336)
---

The honor of your presence is requested at:
the Inauguration of
**Governor**
_John C. Carney_
and
**Lieutenant Governor**
_Bethany A. Hall-Long_

Please [register](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8687547980183502848/-5848742152791654400?ref=ebtn) below for the following events:

**Celebration of the Arts in Delaware**

Saturday, January 14, 2017, 7:00 p.m.
Clear Space Theatre
20 Baltimore Avenue, Rehoboth Beach, DE
[_Free admission, preregistration required_](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8687547980183502848/-5848742152791654400?ref=ebtn)

Sunday, January 15, 2017, 7:00 p.m.
P.S. DuPont Middle School Auditorium
701 W. 34th Street, Wilmington, DE
[_Free admission, preregistration required_](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8687547980183502848/-5848742152791654400?ref=ebtn)

**Interfaith Prayer Service**
**Tuesday, January 17, 2017, 9:00 a.m.**
Whatcoat United Methodist Church
341 Saulsbury Road, Dover, DE

**Inauguration Ceremony**
Tuesday, January 17, 2017, 11:00 a.m.
Legislative Mall, Dover, Delaware
_Open to the public_

**Public Greeting**
Following the Inauguration Ceremony
Legislative Hall, Dover, DE

**Inauguration Celebration**
Tuesday, January 17, 2017, 7:00 p.m
The Rollins Center at Dover Downs
1131 North DuPont Highway, Dover, DE
_$35/person ([click here to RSVP and register](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8687547980183502848/-5848742152791654400?ref=ebtn))_

[Advanced registration for ALL events is required by January 6, 2017.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8687547980183502848/-5848742152791654400?ref=ebtn)

To [RSVP and register](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8687547980183502848/-5848742152791654400?ref=ebtn) for the inaugural events, and for more information about the inauguration, please visit [johncarney.org/inauguration](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8687547980183502848/-5776684558753726464). Formal invitations to follow.

For sponsorship information, please contact Jackie Mette at [jackie@johncarney.org](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8687547980183502848/-5704626964715798528?subject=Inaugural%20Sponsorship) or (302) 395-0707.

Thank you for your support, and we look forward to seeing you in January!

Sincerely,

2017 Governor's Inauguration Committee

| Paid for by Friends for John Carney
---
Friends for John Carney
19 E Commons Blvd
2nd Floor
New Castle DE 19720 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8687547980183502848/-5992857340867510272).

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Only 27 days left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump for America, Inc
body:
We need you before the big day. |

Friend, We only have 27 days until I’m officially sworn in as your next president. But until then, we have a lot to get done. We have 4,100 appointed positions to fill. We’re paying for staff to help assemble our administration in advance so that we don’t waste a single second once we’re sworn in on January 20. If you want to drain the swamp with me, I need these people in there to shake up Washington. We want to hit the ground running the second we enter the White House. But we can’t do it unless we put our team together far in advance. Which is why I need your help right now. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25 or $10 to help fund our TRUMP Transition Team. We need to ensure we have the best and brightest from every corner of America at the start of the Trump administration. And it goes well beyond hiring the right people. We’re also working on policies that we can enact on day one. But now we need your help to finish our transition as strong as possible. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25 or $10 to help fund our TRUMP Transition Team. Thanks, Donald J. Trump President-elect of the United States
CONTRIBUTE $100

Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25 or $10 to help fund our TRUMP Transition Team.

name: Jay and Trudi Inslee
subject: Happy holidays! [Check out the photo!]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
>From our family to yours: Happy holidays!

Dear Friend,

Greetings from the Inslee clan! As you can see, we have a host of snowballs in the air this year. We hope you have as much fun with the New Year as our grandkids have with snowballs.

Happy holidays!

Jay & Trudi

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTAxMTM3MjIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTA2MjA2OTU4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0.
